items.title: BBC in Iran: 'Tehran does not think it has lost this war'
items.dek: Lyse Doucet says Iranians want a solution to the long-running animosity with the US, but leaders is not willing to make a deal on Washington's terms.
items.body: Lyse Doucet says Iranians want a solution to the long-running animosity with the US, but leaders is not willing to make a deal on Washington's terms.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Meet 'Dillon the villain': The NBA's biggest antagonist beloved by teammates
items.dek: Dillon Brooks has the Suns one win away from the playoffs.
items.body: Dillon Brooks has the Suns one win away from the playoffs.

items.title: USMNT needs ambitious post-World Cup succession plan
items.dek: Mauricio Pochettino won't coach the USMNT forever, and when he does leave, will U.S. Soccer be able to bring in another big-name boss to replace him?
